mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test..haosen_name_addr ( keyid, name, address, field, remark, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{keyid}, #{name}, #{address}, #{field}, #{remark}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE test..haosen_name_addr SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, field = #{field}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE keyid = #{keyid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test..haosen_qcc_internet_hos ( keyid, name, internet_hos, internet_hosclassify, remark, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{keyid}, #{name}, #{internetHos}, #{internetHosClassify}, #{remark}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE test..haosen_qcc_internet_hos SET name = #{name}, internet_hos = #{internetHos}, internet_hosclassify = #{internetHosClassify}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE keyid = #{keyid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test..haosen_bigclassify ( keyid, name, big_classify, add_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{keyid}, #{name}, #{bigClassify}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE test..haosen_bigclassify SET name = #{name}, big_classify = #{bigClassify}, update_time = GETDATE() WHERE keyid = #{keyid}
